title: Implement forwarding buffer with backpressure (Rust)
description:
Add per-source forwarding buffer to Rust stack (lichen-node or lichen-core):
- Track packets per source IID (MAX_FORWARDING_SOURCES=8, MAX_PACKETS_PER_SOURCE=2)
- Return QueueFull error when limit exceeded
- Send NACK upstream when full (spec appendix-bufferbloat.md)
